mapper.select: SELECT A.USR_CD , A.LOGIN_ID , A.USR_NM FROM TB_USR A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.LOGIN_ID = TRIM(#{loginId}) AND A.LOGIN_PWD = F_COM_ENCRYPT(TRIM(#{loginPw}), #{encryptKey})
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USR SET LAST_LOGIN_DTM = SYSDATE() WHERE USR_CD = #{usrCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
